title: Great bench
comment: I'm a beginner piano player and this bench is great. Some have said it was wobbly, or not comfortable ... Wrong on both counts, and besides, it's a piano bench not an easy chair. No complaints and I will definitely recommend it.

title: Five Stars
comment: Pretty good for the price. It works and people can hear me in game. Good enough!

title: Superb Quality for the price!
comment: This our second of this ukulele. We loved the first one so much and were so impressed by the quality that we bought a second one for our daughter. She loves it!

title: Works wonderfully!!
comment: Great product and provides easy use with an iPad.

title: Perfect for any age
comment: This is beautiful, and the sound is amazing.  Such a beautiful melody that as a parent I don't mind hearing it at all.

title: Why do they have a Tyrolean man on the product? Quality made product.
comment: This Jews Harp ( I guess they are being PC calling it a Jaw Harp ) is made very well with a nice sound to it.

title: 2thumps up
comment: Great buy. Will purchase more. The music store wanted $8 just for 1case. my special20's fit in this case perfectly. Its Not bulky. The zipper is strong and smooth. I use the elastic piece on the back(belthoop) to hold my lil' fold up music notes n a golf pencil.  It also comes with stickers/key labels, so you can know which key is in which case.

title: Makes sense that I'd like what Neil Young likes
comment: Apparently the electric guitar pick I'd been looking for for all these years! Makes sense that I'd like what Neil Young likes. (The Flex 75s are nice too, but a bit too rigid for my strumming style.)

title: Great Sound!
comment: My daughter loves the way her Violin sounds now.

title: Five Stars
comment: Great product. Charges well. Can speak in a whisper and still be heard.

title: Incomplete product!
comment: This adapter is pictured wit a wing nut. It is needed for the damn product to work. I wish I had read the reviews first but figured how can they screw up a simple stand adapter? They did.

title: Absolutely stunning.
comment: I wasn't expecting much when I bought this microphone arm, but my goodness... this works spectacularly. Would recommend to others 100%!!!
